task_description: Build Phases 69-72 of the Quant Ecosystem: Zero-Defect Hardening (error-monitoring, chaos-testing, a11y, security eslint), Universal Tool Layer (quant-tools with 85+ typed tools, planner, executor, permissions), QuantAI Codex + Automation (quant-codex scaffolding/build/deploy, quant-automate triggers/durable-execution), and Phone-Free Agentic Living (voice bridges to all systems, daily brief, phone-free mode enhancements).
